mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role})

INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_id, role) VALUES
(#{m.groupId}, #{m.userId}, #{m.role})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY role, joined_time
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE group_member SET role = #{role} WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE group_member SET group_nickname = #{groupNickname} WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
